title: build(deps): bump github.com/containers/storage from 1.38.1 to 1.38.2
body:
Bumps [github.com/containers/storage](https://github.com/containers/storage) from 1.38.1 to 1.38.2.
Release notes

Sourced from github.com/containers/storage's releases.

v1.38.2

What's Changed

  • Bump to v1.38.1 by @​rhatdan in containers/storage#1117
  • archive: skip lchown if force_mask is set by @​giuseppe in containers/storage#1118
  • Add flate back in, codespell was too agressive by @​rhatdan in containers/storage#1120
  • build(deps): bump github.com/klauspost/compress from 1.14.1 to 1.14.2 by @​dependabot in containers/storage#1119
  • build(deps): bump github.com/containerd/stargz-snapshotter/estargz from 0.10.1 to 0.11.0 by @​dependabot in containers/storage#1122
  • overlay.Get(): default to read-only for layers in additionalStores by @​nalind in containers/storage#1123

Full Changelog: https://github.com/containers/storage/compare/v1.38.1...v1.38.2

Commits
  • 3db6883 Bump to v1.38.2
  • fafe869 Merge pull request #1123 from nalind/ro-for-diff
  • 34afa97 overlay.Get(): default to read-only for layers in additionalStores
  • d467d9f drivers.NaiveDiffDriver.Changes(): mount the parent read-only
  • a719ec7 Merge pull request #1122 from containers/dependabot/go_modules/github.com/con...
  • 8491067 build(deps): bump github.com/containerd/stargz-snapshotter/estargz
  • ce55aa8 Merge pull request #1119 from containers/dependabot/go_modules/github.com/kla...
  • 2952ad8 build(deps): bump github.com/klauspost/compress from 1.14.1 to 1.14.2
  • 73c06b8 Merge pull request #1120 from rhatdan/codespell
  • aaf7457 Add flate back in, codespell was too agressive
  • Additional commits viewable in compare view

[![Dependabot compatibility score](https://dependabot-badges.githubapp.com/badges/compatibility_score?dependency-name=github.com/containers/storage&package-manager=go_modules&previous-version=1.38.1&new-version=1.38.2)](https://docs.github.com/en/github/managing-security-vulnerabilities/about-dependabot-security-updates#about-compatibility-scores) Dependabot will resolve any conflicts with this PR as long as you don't alter it yourself. You can also trigger a rebase manually by commenting `@dependabot rebase`. [//]: # (dependabot-automerge-start) [//]: # (dependabot-automerge-end) ---
Dependabot commands and options
You can trigger Dependabot actions by commenting on this PR: - `@dependabot rebase` will rebase this PR - `@dependabot recreate` will recreate this PR, overwriting any edits that have been made to it - `@dependabot merge` will merge this PR after your CI passes on it - `@dependabot squash and merge` will squash and merge this PR after your CI passes on it - `@dependabot cancel merge` will cancel a previously requested merge and block automerging - `@dependabot reopen` will reopen this PR if it is closed - `@dependabot close` will close this PR and stop Dependabot recreating it. You can achieve the same result by closing it manually - `@dependabot ignore this major version` will close this PR and stop Dependabot creating any more for this major version (unless you reopen the PR or upgrade to it yourself) - `@dependabot ignore this minor version` will close this PR and stop Dependabot creating any more for this minor version (unless you reopen the PR or upgrade to it yourself) - `@dependabot ignore this dependency` will close this PR and stop Dependabot creating any more for this dependency (unless you reopen the PR or upgrade to it yourself)
